overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person train ride through the futuristic city of Night City. The clip transitions from the interior of a metro car to panoramic views of towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, industrial districts, and dense urban architecture as the train travels along elevated tracks through the cyberpunk metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro car interior with passengers

agents.ego_description: standing inside the metro car, looking around at the interior and other passengers

notable_agents.action: passenger standing near the metro door holding a pole
passenger sitting on bench looking at a phone

entered.detail: yellow vertical support pole in the center of the car
green upholstered bench seating along the side
illuminated information screen showing route details
glass and metal sliding door with teal frame

segments.scene_description: The segment shows the interior of a futuristic metro car with teal and orange neon lighting. The camera stands among sparse passengers, with yellow support poles and green bench seating visible. The environment is fully enclosed with artificial lighting and digital displays showing route information.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro car window area transitioning to exterior view

events.description: camera pans from interior to the window, revealing the cyberpunk cityscape outside

agents.ego_description: turning toward the window to view the passing cityscape

entered.detail: large red neon sign shaped like lips on a building exterior
exterior wall of building with illuminated windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the interior to the window view, revealing a vibrant cyberpunk cityscape with neon signs. The iconic red lips neon sign becomes visible on a building exterior as the train moves past, with the interior elements shifting to the periphery of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train view of industrial cityscape and observation tower

events.description: emerging from shaded interior to bright midday sunlight illuminating the city
passing from industrial district with smokestacks to dense commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: viewing the expansive cityscape from the moving train window, observing landmarks and industrial areas

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with circular observation platforms and red accents
multiple tall chimneys emitting white smoke in the industrial district
elevated multi-lane highway crossing through the urban landscape
tall cylindrical building with green-tinted glass windows

segments.scene_description: The train travels through an open elevated section offering panoramic views of Night City. A distinctive circular observation tower dominates the skyline while industrial smokestacks punctuate the horizon. The scene is bathed in bright midday sunlight with clear blue skies, showcasing the contrast between industrial and commercial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon between high-rise buildings

events.description: passing extremely close to green cylindrical building temporarily blocking the view
entering covered underpass section between concrete structures

agents.ego_description: passing through narrow corridors between towering buildings with close proximity to walls

entered.detail: tall curved residential tower with green facade and horizontal lines
massive concrete highway structure crossing above the train tracks
illuminated station identifier sign reading LC896 with number 10

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dense urban canyon, passing extremely close to a distinctive green cylindrical building. The environment shifts from open panoramic views to narrow passages between high-rise structures, with concrete overpasses and industrial elements dominating the scene. The train approaches a station platform marked with the identifier LC896.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront station approach with suspension bridge views

events.description: approaching waterfront area with view of suspension bridge and harbor

agents.ego_description: approaching the station while viewing the waterfront, bridges, and final urban landmarks

entered.detail: large cable-stayed bridge spanning across the water with tall pylons
body of water visible between buildings with industrial docks
large floating digital billboard displaying product advertisements
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and steam vents

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the train approaching the station with views of a suspension bridge spanning the waterfront. Holographic advertisements float near modern glass skyscrapers, while the train moves through a semi-covered area. The scene combines industrial harbor elements with futuristic commercial architecture as the journey concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed interior of a futuristic metro car into a sweeping panoramic journey through the dense urban layers of Night City. It begins within the teal and orange glow of the train car among sparse passengers and digital displays before shifting focus toward the window to reveal a vibrant cityscape marked by iconic red neon signs. As the train emerges onto an open elevated section, the enclosed atmosphere gives way to bright midday sunlight and clear blue skies, showcasing a skyline dominated by a circular observation tower and industrial smokestacks. The scene then tightens as the train plunges into a narrow urban canyon, gliding past a green cylindrical building and concrete overpasses toward station LC896. Finally, the view expands once more to reveal a suspension bridge and floating holographic advertisements near glass skyscrapers as the train enters a semi-covered area overlooking the industrial harbor.
